info.title: Microsoft Advertising API
info.description: Microsoft Advertising (formerly Bing Ads) API for managing search advertising campaigns across the Microsoft Search Network (Bing, Yahoo, AOL). Manage campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, audiences, reporting, budgets, billing, and more.
